input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Bravo Analytics addressed to CEO. There is a separate thread with CTO. Do NOT reference or CC CTO.

dimensions.name: no_secondary_contact
dimensions.check: 'cto' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'cc' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'copy' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-021] CEO thread for commercial discussion. CTO thread separate. Maintain isolation.
